meaning: n.钉书钉,钉,主要产品(或商品),原材料,主要成分,来源adj.主要的,常用的,大宗生产的v.把...分类,把...分级
examples: Royal gossip is a staple of the tabloid press.
Fish is a staple in the diet of many Africans.
It is well-known that bamboo shoots are a panda's staple diet.
"In some of these developing countries, prices have gone up 80% for staple food, " she added.
Other factories producing staple foods are being inspected, and ordered to concentrate on making price-controlled goods.
